center.summary: 加州州立理工大學波莫納分校是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紫冠亞馬遜鸚鵡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last = Mabb |first = Karen |year = 2003 |title = Naturalized parrot roost flock characteristics and habitat utilization in a suburban area of Los Angeles County, California |place = San Luis Obispo, CA |publisher = California State Polytechnic University }} These populations often are found in residential areas and occasionally in nesting groups with red-crowned parrots in native conifer forests or non-native captive plants
